'''鈭歾-d-j''' ('''kazadaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:edder|edder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:edder|edder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-d-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazadaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadaj|thizadaj]] || [[word:jizadaj|jizadaj]] || [[word:shizadaj|shizadaj]] || [[word:kizadaj|kizadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadaj|thuthuzadaj]] || [[word:jujuzadaj|jujuzadaj]] || [[word:shushuzadaj|shushuzadaj]] || [[word:kukuzadaj|kukuzadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzadaj|thuzadaj]] || [[word:juzadaj|juzadaj]] || [[word:shuzadaj|shuzadaj]] || [[word:kuzadaj|kuzadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzadaj|thuzadaj]] || [[word:juzadaj|juzadaj]] || [[word:shuzadaj|shuzadaj]] || [[word:kuzadaj|kuzadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezadaj|thezadaj]] || [[word:jezadaj|jezadaj]] || [[word:shezadaj|shezadaj]] || [[word:kezadaj|kezadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozadaj|thothozadaj]] || [[word:jojozadaj|jojozadaj]] || [[word:shoshozadaj|shoshozadaj]] || [[word:kokozadaj|kokozadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozadaj|thozadaj]] || [[word:jozadaj|jozadaj]] || [[word:shozadaj|shozadaj]] || [[word:kozadaj|kozadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadaj|thozadaj]] || [[word:jozadaj|jozadaj]] || [[word:shozadaj|shozadaj]] || [[word:kozadaj|kozadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zadaj|th忙zadaj]] || [[word:j忙zadaj|j忙zadaj]] || [[word:sh忙zadaj|sh忙zadaj]] || [[word:k忙zadaj|k忙zadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazadaj|thathazadaj]] || [[word:jajazadaj|jajazadaj]] || [[word:shashazadaj|shashazadaj]] || [[word:kakazadaj|kakazadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazadaj|thazadaj]] || [[word:jazadaj|jazadaj]] || [[word:shazadaj|shazadaj]] || [[word:kazadaj|kazadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadaj|thazadaj]] || [[word:jazadaj|jazadaj]] || [[word:shazadaj|shazadaj]] || [[word:kazadaj|kazadaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazadaj|shazadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazadaj|goshazadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazadaj|gokishazadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazadajn眉|shazadajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazadajnkn眉|goshazadajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadajn眉|gokishazadajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazadajsh毛|shazadajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazadajnksh毛|goshazadajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazadajsh毛|gokishazadajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadajro|shazadajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadajnkro|goshazadajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadajro|gokishazadajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadajmu|shazadajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadajnkmu|goshazadajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadajmu|gokishazadajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazadajsher|shazadajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazadajnksher|goshazadajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazadajsher|gokishazadajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazadajng|shazadajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazadajnkng|goshazadajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazadajng|gokishazadajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazadajya|shazadajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazadajnkya|goshazadajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazadajya|gokishazadajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazadajyam|shazadajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazadajnkyam|goshazadajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazadajyam|gokishazadajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadajn眉sh毛|shazadajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadajnkn眉sh毛|goshazadajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadajn眉sh毛|gokishazadajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadajn眉ro|shazadajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadajnkn眉ro|goshazadajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadajn眉ro|gokishazadajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadajn眉mu|shazadajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadajnkn眉mu|goshazadajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadajn眉mu|gokishazadajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadajsh毛n眉|shazadajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadajnksh毛n眉|goshazadajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadajsh毛n眉|gokishazadajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadajsh毛ro|shazadajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadajnksh毛ro|goshazadajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadajsh毛ro|gokishazadajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadajsh毛mu|shazadajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadajnksh毛mu|goshazadajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadajsh毛mu|gokishazadajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadajron眉|shazadajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadajnkron眉|goshazadajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadajron眉|gokishazadajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadajrosh毛|shazadajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadajnkrosh毛|goshazadajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadajrosh毛|gokishazadajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadajromu|shazadajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadajnkromu|goshazadajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadajromu|gokishazadajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadajmun眉|shazadajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadajnkmun眉|goshazadajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadajmun眉|gokishazadajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadajmush毛|shazadajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadajnkmush毛|goshazadajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadajmush毛|gokishazadajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadajmuro|shazadajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadajnkmuro|goshazadajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadajmuro|gokishazadajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
